Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a base DECLARE model for a loan application review process We need to add constraints to mitigate bias based on sensitive attributes ApplicantAge ApplicantGender ApplicantRace

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We will assume that the following activities are present or we add them for the constraints to work CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantAge ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Since the example model does not have any activities for sensitive attributes we must extend the model with new activities However the problem does not specify that we can add new activities It only says to add constraints But note The problem says add new constraints and constraints are based on activities If we do not have the activities we must add them

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: However note The existing model does not have separate activities for decisions on minority applicants We might need to introduce new activities But the problem says to add constraints to the model not necessarily to introduce new activities arbitrarily Alternatively we can use the existing decision activities and assume that we have separate activities for when a sensitive attribute is disclosed But the model does not have such activities Lets reconsider

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: We have two options a Introduce new activities like CheckApplicantRace ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck and then add constraints b Use the existing activities and hope that the model already has activities for sensitive checks But the example model does not

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If we do not have the activities we must add them Actually the problem says You must introduce constraints that ensure that the sequence of activities does not discriminate This implies that we might need to assume the existence of certain activities

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We decide to do the following We introduce a set of activities CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantAge ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can add Coexistence For any sensitive attribute check race gender age we require that if it occurs then ManualReview must occur Non succession For each sensitive check we prevent it from being immediately followed by FinalDecision Also we can enforce that after a sensitive check there must be a BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The initial model already has a succession from RequestAdditionalInfo to FinalDecision We do not want to break that Our new succession constraint does not conflict because it is from a different activity

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: We also consider that the manual review might be the same as the bias mitigation check We do not necessarily Therefore we change Instead of coexistence we use response for the manual review requirement

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Response constraints For each sensitive attribute check race gender age we require that a ManualReview must occur after it Succession constraints For each sensitive attribute check we require that a BiasMitigationCheck must eventually follow Non succession constraints For each sensitive attribute check we prevent it from being immediately followed by FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We do not add existence for the new activities because they are only required when the sensitive check occurs They do not have to occur in every trace
